summary: Iteration 26: Frontend-only testing of UI/UX improvements. All 7 requested features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Section Headers - colored left borders displayed (IPAM=blue, Internal DNS=green, External DNS=teal, DHCP=orange, Security=red)
Section Headers - question count badges displayed (e.g., '15 questions', '10 questions', '6 questions')
Section Collapse/Expand - clicking section checkbox triggers confirmation dialog, chevron rotates with rotate-90 class
Font sizes - text uses text-[13px] class, computed font size is 13px (slightly larger than before)
Sidebar collapse - clicking collapse button collapses sidebar from 240px to 64px (icons-only mode)
Target Solutions 'Why not?' - deselecting UDDI shows 'Why not?' textarea with Required badge
Target Solutions 'Why not?' - deselecting Security shows 'Why not?' textarea with Required badge
Target Solutions 'Why not?' - deselecting Asset Insights shows 'Why not?' textarea with Required badge
QuickSiteEntry - DC/Site toggle works (DC=blue, Site=green active states)
QuickSiteEntry - Add button (data-testid='quick-entry-add') enabled when name filled
Deployment Model selector on Sizing tab - NIOS Only, UDDI Only, Hybrid buttons all present and functional
critical_code_review_comments: AssessmentQuestions.jsx: Section headers (lines 604-656) correctly implement colored borders via sectionColors object and question count badges
AssessmentQuestions.jsx: Section collapse animation uses max-h-[5000px]/max-h-0 with transition-all duration-300
AssessmentQuestions.jsx: Font size correctly set to text-[13px] for question text
AppSidebar.jsx: Sidebar collapse (lines 70-311) toggles between w-60 (240px) and w-16 (64px) with transition-all duration-300
PlatformSelection.jsx: TargetSolutions (lines 14-83) correctly shows 'Why not?' textarea with Required badge when solution deselected
PlatformSelection.jsx: DeploymentModel (lines 86-125) correctly implements NIOS Only, UDDI Only, Hybrid buttons with data-testid attributes
QuickSiteEntry.jsx: DC/Site toggle, name/KW inputs, Add button all have proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Used existing 'Test Customer Frontend' customer with 4 DCs and 1 Site
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI/UX improvements fully implemented and tested. Section headers have colored left borders (IPAM=blue, Internal DNS=green, External DNS=teal, DHCP=orange, Security=red) and question count badges. Sections collapse/expand with animation. Font size is 13px. Sidebar collapses to icons-only mode. 'Why not?' textarea appears for deselected Target Solutions (UDDI, Security, Asset Insights) with Required badge. QuickSiteEntry DC/Site toggle, inputs, and Add button all functional. Deployment Model selector on Sizing tab has NIOS Only, UDDI Only, Hybrid buttons.

section_headers.question_count_badges: Yes - displays 'X questions' badge in each section header

section_collapse_expand.toggle_mechanism: Checkbox in section header triggers confirmation dialog when disabling
section_collapse_expand.chevron_rotation: rotate-90 class applied when section expanded

quick_site_entry.dc_site_toggle: Yes - DC (blue) and Site (green) toggle buttons

deployment_model.selection_state: bg-primary class applied to selected button
